home.tagline: Board advisor · Catalog + common ground · Spot map + SUP index · Provider directory

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

turnstile.disabledNotice: Bot protection (Turnstile) is disabled in development mode.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in with email and password, or request a magic link.
login.magicLinkHint: Instead of a password, we email you a sign-in link.
login.magicLinkSentBody: If an account exists for this address, we have sent a sign-in link.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.subtitle: Create an account with your email and a password.
signup.confirmationSentBody: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Until you confirm you can browse, but cannot post reviews or reports.

emailConfirm.unconfirmedBanner: Confirm your email to post reviews. Browsing keeps working in the meantime.
emailConfirm.callbackErrorBody: The link expired or was already used. Request a new one at sign-in.

errors.captchaRequired: Please verify that you are not a robot.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
